If you did not request this verification, please contact us immediately at [customer.support@bank.com](mailto:customer.support@bank.com) or call us at [1-800-XXX-XXXX] to report this.

Best regards,  
[Bank Name] Customer Support Team  
[Bank Logo]  
[Bank Website URL] | [Privacy Policy] | [Terms of Use]
